case_title: GARBER, THOMAS B. vs. KOMP, EDWARD et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GARBER, THOMAS B. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KOMP, EDWARD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: [PREMISES RESTORED 03-APR-96] $39.69 RENT, $860.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $179.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,078.69, LEASE FORFEITED, NOTATION DONE ON ORIGINAL INSTRUMENT PER C.R.C. 522

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KOMP, EDWARD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 400 HYDE ST #510, LEASE FORFEITED, NOTATION DONE ON ORIGINAL INSTRUMENT- CRC 522
